description: Node.js heap pressure over moltnet-metrics. Values are bytes; threshold is intentionally below the 1 GiB Fly machine ceiling. If this fires, compare heap trend with request volume, task activity, and recent deploys.
mplQuery:
`moltnet-metrics`:`v8js.memory.heap.used`
| align to 1m using max
| group by `service.name` using max
name: MoltNet heap pressure by service
